title: Canon Entry
description: One resolved, ACCEPTED canon entry -- a proper-name/realia decision that has already cleared the glossary-pass merge step and lives in canon.json's entries{} map. Renamed from the historiettes-t3 reference project's canon.schema.json. If basis == "established", source is required and must be a non-empty URI (the glossary-pass agent's cited reference for the established rendering). If basis == "sense_translated", note and is_proper_name are required, is_proper_name must be true, and source is forbidden -- a sense-translated speaking name is a project-specific editorial rendering, not a citable conventional form. PRECEDENCE (D12): basis:"established" wins whenever a citable conventional target form exists (cite it via source); basis:"sense_translated" is reserved for a rendering with no established-form claim.

category.description: Optional, OPEN-vocabulary per-project entity category (e.g. 'person', 'place', 'work', 'group', 'divine-name') -- declared and catalogued per-project in output.adapter_config.obsidian.folders, NOT a hardcoded schema enum (the catalog differs per work). Orthogonal to 'basis' (HOW the rendering was decided) and 'is_proper_name' (whether this is a name at all) -- 'category' is WHAT KIND of entity this is. Absent or blank is a valid value: consumers (e.g. the obsidian adapter) treat it as 'other'.
